description: Deterministic risk policy for V3.5 paper trading and V5 live trading. All limits are hard — no override permitted. Pre-RL: these are fixed rules. V4 RL will learn to optimize within these constraints.

position_limits.justification: 6 simultaneous positions across 9 pairs limits maximum correlated drawdown. 1 per pair prevents pyramiding. 4 per timeframe prevents timeframe concentration.

exposure_limits.justification: Max 3 USD-correlated positions caps portfolio beta to USD at ~60%. Same logic for JPY crosses. Based on correlation analysis: EUR/GBP/AUD/NZD pairs have 0.6-0.85 correlation to USD direction.

drawdown_limits.justification: Daily limit at 100 pips prevents single-day catastrophic loss. Weekly limit at 250 pips allows recovery. Total limit at 500 pips is the absolute stop — forces manual review before resuming.

cooldown.justification: 5 consecutive losses suggests regime change or model failure. 10-bar cooldown allows regime to stabilize. Hostile regime gets 20 bars — roughly 10 hours on M30.

position_sizing.notes: V3.5 uses equal weight (fixed lot size). V4 RL will optimize sizing. Do not implement Kelly or volatility sizing until RL layer is built.
